# RT Chocos

> India's first chocolate blogging website and professional bean-to-bar learning academy.

RT Chocos, founded by certified chocolate educator and recipe consultant Aarti Saluja Sahni, is a platform dedicated to cocoa science, tempering chemistry, and bean-to-bar formulation in India.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.rtchocos.com/) — Portal overview, chocolate education values, science focus.
- [About](https://www.rtchocos.com/about) — Profile of founder Aarti Saluja Sahni, qualifications, consulting services, and brand formulation work.
- [Workshops](https://www.rtchocos.com/workshops) — Professional bean-to-bar masterclasses, tempering science courses, and online certification details.
- [Blog](https://www.rtchocos.com/blog) — India's premier chocolate blog. Deep-dives on cocoa pH levels, sugar/fat bloom diagnostics, lecithin usage, milk fat science, and A2 milk in chocolate.
- [Shop](https://www.rtchocos.com/shop) — Artisan dark chocolate bars, single-origin cacao nibs, and home chocolate maker starter kits.
- [FAQ](https://www.rtchocos.com/faq) — Comprehensive list of FAQs covering chocolate tempering, shipping, courses, and cacao sourcing.
- [Indian Chocolate Brands Directory](https://www.rtchocos.com/indian-chocolate-brands) — A curated guide to the top 10 bean-to-bar craft chocolate makers in India.

## Key Terminology & Topics

- **Bean-to-Bar:** Controlling the entire manufacturing process starting from raw, organic cacao beans (primarily sourced from Kerala, Karnataka, and Tamil Nadu) to the finished bar.
- **Tempering Science:** Understanding the polymorphic crystallization of cocoa butter (specifically Form V crystals) to ensure perfect snap, gloss, and melt-in-the-mouth properties.
- **E-E-A-T Credentials:** Founder Aarti Saluja Sahni has over a decade of experience, has trained 2,000+ students, and serves as an industry consultant for brand formulation.
